message:
fix(dot_parser): improve looks_like_dot direction token matching

The heuristic used prefix matching for Mermaid direction keywords (td,
lr, etc.), so DOT graphs named "tdb", "btree", "lrp" etc. were
incorrectly classified as Mermaid format. Also, "graphFoo" (no space
after "graph") was matched as DOT.

Fix: require direction keywords to be complete tokens (followed by
whitespace, ';', or EOF), and require a separator after "graph".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
